name: Hanauma Bay
tagline: Oahu's crown jewel — a volcanic crater teeming with reef fish that eat out of your hand.
bestTime: Early morning for clearest water and best fish activity; Wed or Thu for smallest crowds
insiderTips: Online reservations required at hanaumabaystatepark.com — book 2+ days ahead, slots sell out fast. Free mandatory 9-min conservation video before entry. Bring your own snorkel gear to save $20+ rental fee. Snorkel toward the left (Witch's Brew area) for fewer people and better coral. The tram ride down is $1.25 but the walk is easy — save the tram for the uphill return when you're tired.
kamaaina: Free entry for Hawaii residents with valid ID
